text:
CI-IMAGES
=========

At the time of writing, neither 14.0 nor 14.1 at <https://download.freebsd.org/snapshots/CI-IMAGES/>. 


ISO-IMAGES
==========

<https://download.freebsd.org/snapshots/ISO-IMAGES/14.1/> is present but not yet populated. Maybe inconsistent with the 2024-06-21 announcement.
